name: Corsair Void RGB Elite USB 7.1 Surround Sound Premium Gaming Headset
description: Audio Quality, Stunning Sound Hear everything in 7.1 surround sound from the lightest footstep to the most thundering explosion thanks to premium, custom-tuned 50mm high-density neodymium audio drivers with an expanded frequency range of 20Hz-30,000Hz. Total Comfort Constructed for enduring comfort through long gaming sessions with breathable microfiber mesh fabric and plush memory foam earpads. Low-Latency 2.4GHz Wireless Play with the freedom of up to 40ft of wireless range and up to 16 hours
